# Field Investigation

**Summary**: Direct observation and sampling of environmental parameters and biological samples in their natural habitats.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] used field investigation to compare trace metal and hydrocarbon levels between mangrove and non-mangrove areas.

## Key Results and Findings

- Field observations were used to determine the concentration of metals and hydrocarbons in both sediment and plant tissues across multiple sites along the Arabian Gulf. ([[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019, p. 23]])
